original: Insistent movements stir you from slumber, more effective than an alarm clock you’re this close to hurtling against the wall. The first thing you see when waking up is Able’s characteristic winning smile, and a long breath flumes out of your nostrils. “Good morning, [pc.name],” he says, favoring you with his skillful massages despite being [pc.isBimbo |turbo |over ]-cuddled. He bops his nose to yours, then pulls away. “A day like this should not be wasted in bed.” Part of you can detect a little doting finger wag in that. “But stay a bit. I’ll make breakfast.” You crawl up against the pillows and rub the sleepiness from your eyes. Ten minutes later Able returns, carrying a dish laden with unostentatious foodstuffs. He tries so hard to keep a stoic expression of propriety while you eat, but you don’t miss the boyish charm and youthful mischief in his beetle-black eyes. And, of course, the damp spots in his black pants where he came himself senseless last night. How many, you wonder... Work begins outside the walls as you finish up and redress. “I’ll see you out,” the zil says. Able walks nearer to you than before. Every time you think he might speak his mind, another of the manor’s occupants appears. Before long you’re back at the entrance... and before you can leave, he latches to you in an affectionate hug. “Come back anytime, [pc.name],” he says, stepping back. Unable to make eye contact, he looks demure until the gates close.
